name: Tencent Cloud
description: Tencent Cloud — Chinese hyperscaler offering compute, AI APIs, CDN, and managed databases with global and China regions.

seo.title: Tencent Cloud — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Tencent Cloud: Tencent Cloud — Chinese hyperscaler offering compute, AI APIs, CDN, and managed databases with global and China regions.

when_to_use: Chinese hyperscaler with domestic data residency for apps
WeChat mini-program backend with Tencent Cloud APIs
AI APIs for NLP and vision in Chinese product stack
CDN and global acceleration for Chinese consumer apps
Managed database and compute for Chinese enterprise

cons: Complex China vs global account split
review.verdict: Essential if you serve mainland China, but operationally painful if your team sits outside that ecosystem.
review.best_for: Apps targeting Chinese users needing in-country infra

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down

lock_in.reason: Hyperscaler, deep integration hard to move
